name: Haydee 3
short_description: Haydee III is a hardcore metroidvania with third-person shooter mechanics, platforming, puzzles, a sexy heroine and cake!
detailed_description:
Haydee III is the long-awaited sequel in the Haydee series, which will connect the story of the first and second games. As before, it features a heroine trapped in a facility filled with secrets, traps, and foes. Six new themed zones will immerse you in a profound sense of being lost, doomed, and desperate. Draw your pistols and screwdrivers, and clear your pockets out of junk. A new challenge awaits!

You can expect:

  • A vast, intricate facility

  • Lethal traps

  • Limited inventory space

  • A lack of resources

  • Secrets and puzzles

  • Fail after fail

  • The thrill of triumph

And also mods, an editor, and the ability to climb on crates. Good luck!

supported_languages: English, Russian, Italian, German, Vietnamese, Simplified Chinese, Japanese
